mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.name AS "name", a.img AS "img", a.value AS "value", a.sort AS "sort", a.status AS "status", a.type AS "type", a.description AS "description", a.create_by AS "createBy", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_by AS "updateBy", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM gift a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.status = '1' ORDER BY a.`value` ASC, a.create_date DESC

SELECT
FROM gift a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.status = '1' AND a.type = #{type} ORDER BY a.`value` ASC, a.create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gift( id, name, img, value, sort, status, type, description, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, del_flag ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{name}, #{img}, #{value}, #{sort}, #{status}, #{type}, #{description}, #{createBy}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{delFlag} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE gift
name = #{name},
img = #{img},
value = #{value},
sort = #{sort},
status = #{status},
type = #{type},
description = #{description},
update_by = #{updateBy},
update_date = #{updateDate},
remarks = #{remarks},
WHERE id = #{id}
